text: Bitcoin and Ethereum are both down modestly over 24 hours, with BTC showing slightly more weakness at -1.2% while ETH held closer to flat, suggesting some defensive rotation toward the largest asset. The Fear & Greed Index at 18 (Extreme Fear) and worsening over the past week signals heightened anxiety, though the $43B in daily volume remains moderate rather than capitulatory. Bitcoin dominance at 55.6% reflects cautious positioning where investors are holding the safest major asset, but the broader market hasn't entered panic-sell territory yet.
